ogTitle: Nelshaby vs Nene Valley: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nelshaby and Nene Valley.
heading: Nelshaby vs Nene Valley — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nelshaby, South Australia and Nene Valley, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nene Valley has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Nelshaby (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nelshaby or Nene Valley safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nelshaby has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Nene Valley scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nelshaby scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Nene Valley scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nelshaby or Nene Valley?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nene Valley has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
